Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tartarus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Tartarus is associated with Miram's title as Master Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Tartarus is a possible power or path Leah associates with Simon's sword summoning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Tartarus is a location where beasts of razor-sharp steel originate.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Tartarus is a place where honor does not matter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Tartarus is a type of Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Armor was forged in Tartarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Tartarus is a location from which low-ranking Travelers might originate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Tartarus is a silver-key Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Tartarus is a group of men and women in armored uniforms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Tartarus is a type of Traveler that can be summoned by guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Tartarus is a location that still stands.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Tartarus contains a Labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Tartarus is a Grandmaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Three women behind Grandmaster Naraka wear the armor of Tartarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Elysian Incarnation has recruited thirty-seven Tartarus Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Tartarus is a metal giant with a helmeted head that uses twisting bronze gears instead of eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Tartarus has a voice that sounds like grinding rocks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Tartarus wields a solid, shining red sword with twisting black lettering on its flat surface.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Tartarus has a team that could subdue Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Tartarus has been defeated and his pieces are being dragged away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Tartarus is one of the nine Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Tartarus is a ten-foot giant in mirrored steel armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Tartarus is an Incarnation with blank clockwork eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Tartarus swung a sword at Kai's neck.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
